rationale: All required content is present and correct: bold white 'Dr. Maya Chen', muted gray 'CLIMATE SCIENTIST, NOAA' (uppercase styling, content intact), teal vertical accent bar, lower-left at roughly x=120 with baseline near y=940, on the #0E1116 background. The filmstrip shows the briefed choreography: empty first tile, accent bar leading the entrance in tile 2, full hold through the middle tiles, and an empty final still confirming the exit completes by 5.0s. Motion loses a point because the strip captures only one transitional frame — the staggered name/role entrance and the fade+slide exit are barely evidenced between adjacent tiles, so the eases can't be fully verified (though a back-loaded accelerating exit is consistent with the near-opaque last tile). Typography is tight with clear hierarchy and comfortable contrast; this is essentially shippable with at most a minor timing check on the exit.
